data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Shipping if not pickup', but the evidence does not confirm this requirement. While the linked use case mentions shipping as an option, there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate the actual shipping process when pickup is not selected. This leads to a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as the evidence does not support the necessary validation of the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the shipping process when pickup is not selected.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the shipping process when pickup is not selected.
